creator: adsh@univ.kiev.ua
text:
When I attempt to update 9.1-RELEASE-p4 to 9.1-RELEASE-p6 via freebsd-update I found that freebsd-update ignore some config options:

/etc/freebsd-update.conf => Components src/base src/sys world

freebsd-update fetch
Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 5 mirrors found.
Fetching metadata signature for 9.1-RELEASE from update3.freebsd.org... done.
Fetching metadata index... done.
Inspecting system... done.
Preparing to download files... done.
Fetching 4 files... done.

The following files are affected by updates, but no changes have
been downloaded because the files have been modified locally:
/etc/mail/sendmail.cf
/etc/mail/submit.cf

The following files will be updated as part of updating to 9.1-RELEASE-p6:
/usr/include/dev/mfi/mfivar.h

==> src/base src/sys not updated! <==

/etc/freebsd-update.conf => Components src world

freebsd-update fetch
Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 5 mirrors found.
Fetching metadata signature for 9.1-RELEASE from update3.freebsd.org... done.
Fetching metadata index... done.
Inspecting system... done.
Preparing to download files... done.
Fetching 10 patches.....10 done.
Applying patches... done.
Fetching 1 files... done.

The following files are affected by updates, but no changes have
been downloaded because the files have been modified locally:
/etc/mail/sendmail.cf
/etc/mail/submit.cf

The following files will be added as part of updating to 9.1-RELEASE-p6:
/usr/src/crypto/openssl/ssl/s3_cbc.c

The following files will be updated as part of updating to 9.1-RELEASE-p6:
/usr/include/dev/mfi/mfivar.h
/usr/src/sys/conf/newvers.sh
/usr/src/sys/dev/mfi/mfi.c
/usr/src/sys/dev/mfi/mfi_cam.c
/usr/src/sys/dev/mfi/mfi_disk.c
/usr/src/sys/dev/mfi/mfi_syspd.c
/usr/src/sys/dev/mfi/mfi_tbolt.c
/usr/src/sys/dev/mfi/mfivar.h
/usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_export.c
/usr/src/sys/netinet/in_mcast.c
/usr/src/sys/netinet/sctp_output.c
/usr/src/sys/netinet6/in6_mcast.c

==> src updated correctly! <==

How-To-Repeat: Run freebsd-update with described config options.
